description: Nighttime photograph (no added graphic design or on-image slogans). It shows a tan and desert-colored armored tactical vehicle (a BearCat-style truck) marked 'HOMELAND SECURITY INVESTIGATIONS' along its side and bearing the DHS seal on the rear door, parked in a snow-edged lot under a dark blue sky. Two agents in multicam camouflage tactical gear and helmets stand with their backs to the camera near the open, red-lit rear compartment; one wears a vest plate reading 'HSI POLICE.' A third camouflaged agent stands at left near another vehicle. The 'HSI POLICE' and vehicle markings are signage on the equipment. The tweet credits ICE ERO and HSI for a sweep removing Trinitarios gang members from Massachusetts.
notable_text: HOMELAND SECURITY INVESTIGATIONS; HSI POLICE (vehicle and vest markings, not designed text)
